_promotion_rules.note: N_test >= 5000 required for best_* aliases. Experiments with >90% train split or N_test < 5000 go to comparison_* only (see _experiment_flags).

_experiment_flags.note: Experiments marked 'fair=false' should NOT be promoted to best_* aliases.

exp107_maxdata_95train.reason: 95% train split leaves only N=960 test — statistically fragile, not comparable to standard 70/30 splits.

best_per.description: Best phoneme accuracy on large test set (N=28.8k). Recommended general-purpose model.
best_per.notes: DA Loss lambda=0.2 + syllable separators + structural distance correction (fixed). SOTA PER on fair evaluation.

best_wer.description: Best word accuracy (N=28.8k). Recommended for NLP, search, word-level tasks.
best_wer.notes: DA Loss lambda=0.2, intermediate capacity 9.7M params. No syllable separators — clean phoneme output.

best_tts.description: Best model for Text-to-Speech. Outputs syllable boundaries (.) and stress markers.
best_tts.notes: Same checkpoint as best_per. Syllable separators improve prosody in TTS pipelines.

fast.description: Fastest model (exp106 target) — pending retrain. 2.58x faster, modest accuracy trade-off.
fast.notes: Retrain exp106 to activate. Expected PER ~0.58%, WER ~6.12%, ~400 w/s on CPU.

comparison_latphon.description: Methodological comparison with LatPhon 2025 (N=960). NOT eligible for best_* aliases.
comparison_latphon.notes: N_test=960 too small for fair comparison. 95% train split inflates PER — experimental condition only.
